title: Lantern Atlas
genericDescription: Implement persistence safely; decide what game state matters; communicate saved progress to players.
specificDescription: A stamp-collecting exploration game that saves position, collected lantern stamps, settings, and best route. It includes reset and corrupt-save fallback behavior.
gradingRubric: 30 pts persistence correctness; 20 pts player-facing save clarity; 20 pts reset/fallback handling; 15 pts testing evidence; 15 pts code organization.
